briefing: Market was neutral today (NASDAQ +0.6%, S&P500 +0.4%), but MANE and CWK stood out with all four confirming signals — MACD crossover, bullish-zone RSI, price above SMA-20, and volume surge — so we deployed some of the $777 cash into these two rather than forcing buys across all open slots. Existing positions were left untouched since neutral days aren't a reason to exit winners; ROAD is now below its avg cost near the stop-loss line and will be handled automatically if it triggers.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum confirmation means waiting for several technical signals to align — like a MACD crossover, healthy RSI, price above its moving average, and a volume surge — before trusting that a stock's upward move is real. A single signal can be noise, but four aligning together suggests genuine buying interest rather than a random price blip.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能確認是指在相信股票升勢屬實之前，等待多個技術指標同時出現一致訊號，例如MACD黃金交叉、健康的RSI水平、股價高於移動平均線，以及成交量放大。單一訊號可能只是市場雜訊，但四項訊號同時出現，往往代表真正的買盤興趣，而非隨機的短暫波動。

market_education.summary_en: Major indices drifted modestly higher today with NASDAQ up 0.6% and the S&P 500 up 0.4%, a quiet, directionless session rather than a strong risk-on move. Without a clear macro catalyst, price action was driven mainly by stock-specific momentum rather than broad sector rotation. Several individual names showed strong multi-signal technical setups even as the index-level trend stayed flat.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日大市溫和上揚，納指升0.6%，標普500升0.4%，屬於缺乏明確方向的平淡交易日，未見強烈的風險偏好升溫。在沒有明顯宏觀催化劑帶動下，走勢主要由個股層面的動能主導，而非板塊輪動。部分個股在技術指標上呈現多重確認的強勢訊號，即使大市整體趨勢仍然持平。

trades.reasoning: Full 4-signal confirmation (RSI 58 bullish zone, MACD crossover, price above SMA-20, volume surge) signals genuine institutional buying, not just a neutral-day filler.
Same full 4-signal setup as MANE with healthy RSI 59.1, offering diversification away from existing holdings while deploying idle cash above the $500 threshold.
